feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Free Goods YA00 Access Sequence in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and need guidance regarding the configuration possibilities for the standard free goods condition type YA00.

Business Requirement:

Our customer requires additional determination criteria for free goods processing. During our analysis, we identified that the standard condition type YA00 is used for free goods determination; however, we have not found a configuration option that allows us to maintain, modify, or extend the access sequence assigned to this condition type. 

Currently, the standard accesses used by condition YA00 appear to be based on the following combinations: 

  1. Customer / Material 
  2. Sales Organization / Distribution Channel / Customer Pricing Group / Material 
  3. Sales Organization / Distribution Channel / Material 

Questions 

We would like to understand the standard capabilities provided by SAP in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition regarding free goods determination and condition YA00: 

  1. Is it possible to modify the standard access sequence used by condition type YA00? 
  2. Is it possible to create new access sequences for free goods determination? 
  3. Is there any SSCUI, CBC configuration activity, expert configuration, or extensibility option that allows customers to define additional access combinations beyond the standard ones delivered by SAP? 
  4. If modification of the standard access sequence is not supported, what alternative approaches are recommended by SAP to fulfill customer-specific free goods determination requirements? 

Expected Outcome 

We would appreciate confirmation of the supported standard configuration options and any SAP-recommended alternatives that would allow us to implement additional determination criteria for free goods processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 

Thank you for your support, 
María Guzmán.

entry.title: 我在银行清账时显示没有容差组，问题该怎么解决
entry.content: 在银行清账时出现提示“没有容差组”，我想知道如何解决这个问题。对该问题的解决方案我需要确认相关配置和设置，确保容差组正确维护和分配。如果需要，我希望通过支持案例进行详细排查。

entry.title: Bypass of standard error message
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We want to do mass closure of some specific POs, but due to some standard errors, we are not able to close them.

MEPO -254Acceptance at Origin cannot be used with AccAsgt categories with no stock 
ME-347Release orders against contract 4610068068 not possible (contract not released) 

Is there any way we can bypass those standard errors? 

Regards,

Palak

entry.title: DRC for India GSTR reports
entry.content:
Need to Activate DRC for GSTR report with additional feteaures


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Link list in capacity scheduling table
entry.content:
Hi all,

in the capacity scheduling table, you cannot directly modify the production order or planned orders. The link list only displays these items. Are there any ways to expand this link list further (change planned order; change production order)?

 

Kind regards,

Jana

entry.title: CDS view Product classes and characterstics
entry.content: is it just us or do more companies have the opinion SAP is consistently inconsistent with what they turn on for Data Extraction. we are now after characterics and classes for Products/Material which is pretty critical for us. FLOC and Equipment CDS views are turned on but these are not. Why not? when they are? how do other cope with this??

entry.title: CAMT53 into API structure for communication arrangement : SAP_COM_0316 ( NO MBC)
entry.content:
We are in the process of implementing the incoming CAMT53 statement from Bank. In this regard, we understand that there is provision in MBC. But, without MBC, we are using SAP_COM_0316 communication arrangement. However, what would be best way to map the incoming CAMT53 with API Structure. I tried to map the XML with API structure, but not able to find the transaction details int he API structure.

I understand that one check the missing tag in XML by uploading the same in the Test Incoming Format Mapping :

entry.title: Badi for the Stock Information message at PR level
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The client has a requirement to display the available stock of a material as an informational message at two stages:

  1. During Purchase Requisition (PR) creation
  2. At the My Inbox (approver) level

Is there any body where we can make this customization by using BADI.

entry.title: Projecting WBS Element onto Customer Line Items
entry.content:
We are currently unable to view the WBS Element on Customer Line Items within standard operational apps, and we need guidance on the standard configuration to enable this.

During a customer invoice posting (e.g., Journal Entry 9400000112), the WBS Element is successfully populated on the P&L line item (Item 000002 shows WBS 'UAE/ACC/23/WO' in I_ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTJOURNAL). However, the Customer/AR reconciliation line (Item 000001) leaves the WBS Element field blank. Consequently, the WBS Element does not appear when viewing the invoice in the "Manage Customer Line Items" app

entry.title: Public Cloud - How to post a prior-year direct supplier invoice for an asset when MM period is close
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, our client forgot to post a fixed asset purchased in June 2025. The asset master is already created, and now they want to record the acquisition with the original posting date (June 2025).

When we use Create Supplier Invoice or Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced (direct invoice without PO), we receive Message M8022 stating that the MM posting period is not allowed, even though the FI posting period is open.

The Post Asset Acquisition app allows the posting, but it does not create the supplier liability.

Is there any standard way in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to post a prior-year direct supplier invoice for an asset (Dr Asset / Cr Supplier), or is Post Asset Acquisition the only supported option in this scenario?

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

entry.title: Error "No authorization to start the UI for transaction" missing catalogs Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently getting error "No authorization to start the UI for transaction" for the following transactions:

We miss the Croatia catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_GL_HR_PC assigned to the following apps and we cannot access (Croatia is not an active country for us):
107024 Assign Payment Type to a Company Code
107025 Assign Payment Method to a Payment Type

We do have these catalogs assigned to the following apps and we still cannot access:

SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_SR_ES_PC
SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_WT_ES_PC
SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_PLN_PC
SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_GL_ES_PC

106351 Define Tax Box Structure Type
106626 Define Withholding Tax Keys Specific to the Country/Region
104311 Assign Country/Rgn Specific Withholding Tax Keys to Withholding Tax Codes
104808 Define Batch Input Session Parameters
106876 Assign Plan Categories to a Virtual Category


Which are the correct catalogs for these apps access?

Note: Provided catalog "SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_AP0_PC Accounts Payable - Configuration" provides access to "Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions" (101044), which is a different app.


Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Maintenance workflow stuck in approval + Reject not working as expected
entry.content:
we recently introduced a Team Lead approval step by leveraging Flexible workflow for maintenance orders. we really like the concept but there seems a few flunky things happening with this. might be SAP bug, might be our settings. keen to hear views from others:

- 1 WO in approval phase but not showing up in inbox resp person. also not showing up in flex workflow app as "in process" state. so now sort lost in between. any way to give this WO a push

- reject scenario not cleanly going back to workflow initiator. we want to use Reject (+ comment) so we have a daily feedback loop and become better in workprep each & every day. seems not to work as expect yet. hope somebody from SAP product owners read this and thoroughly checks this as good feature to acheive first-time-right-in-full and reduce E2E process friction in all following processes

entry.title: Cannot create preliminary billing document of Sales order line with item category TAN
entry.content:
The Sales order is not displayed in the app Create Billing Documents. Therefore, it is not possible to create a pro forma invoice before delivering and goods issue of the delivery. 

When item cat CBAB is used, the SO is displayed in create billing documents.

entry.title: Which SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Apps Are Required for Access Log Management?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and need to create a user who is responsible for access log management.

The purpose of this user is to monitor and review system access information, such as:

  • Who logged into the system
  • When they logged in
  • Login history and access activities
  • Other relevant audit/access log information

I would like to understand:

  1. Which SAP apps should this user have access to?
  2. What is the purpose of each app?
  3. Are there any standard business catalogs or business roles that already include these applications?
  4. Is there a recommended SAP best practice for creating an "Access Log Management" or "Audit Log" user in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

QuocDT5

entry.title: Manage Customer Line Items – Net Days and WBS Element not displayed
entry.content:
We are reviewing the standard application Manage Customer Line Items and have identified two behaviors that we would like to validate.

1. Net Days field

The customer uses payment terms with a defined number of net due days. However, in the Manage Customer Line Items application, the Net Days field is always displayed as 0, although the payment terms and due date are correctly maintained in the accounting document.

Our understanding is that the application derives this value from the payment terms and baseline date, but in our tests the field is not populated.

Could you please confirm whether this is the standard behavior of the application? If so, under which conditions is the Net Days field populated?

2. WBS Element field

Customer invoices are created with a WBS Element assigned.

The WBS Element is correctly stored in the accounting document and can be displayed in the Display G/L Line Items application.

However, the WBS Element column remains empty

entry.title: Need option to post mass Purchase requisitions
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need a provision to post mass Purchase Requisitions.

Currently, we are creating more than 50 PRs daily, and each PR contains at least 100 line items. Due to the high volume, manual creation is time-consuming and inefficient.

We request a provision for a mass PR upload template through the migration object or any other suitable method to facilitate bulk creation of Purchase Requisitions.

Kindly review and provide the possible options.

Thank you.

entry.title: Request for Mass Purchase Requisition Upload Provision
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need a provision to post mass Purchase Requisitions.

Currently, we are creating more than 50 PRs daily, and each PR contains at least 100-line items. Due to the high volume, manual creation is time-consuming and inefficient.We request a provision for a mass PR upload template through the migration object or any other suitable method to facilitate bulk creation of Purchase Requisitions.

 

Kindly review and provide the possible options.

Thank you.

entry.title: BP_DATAREPL_FND/006 error when replicating Business Partner from SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 to SAP S/
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on the integration scenario 6KO - Opportunity to Order with SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 and I am facing an issue with Business Partner replication from SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 back to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Scenario:
SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 → SAP Cloud Integration → SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Issue:
When a Business Partner is modified in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 and the replication is triggered back to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Message Monitoring in S/4HANA shows the error:

BP_DATAREPL_FND / 006

What is already configured:

  • Communication System created in S/4HANA with Business System field filled with the Display ID obtained from the default communication system in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
  • Communication Arrangement SAP_COM_0008 active with the correct Communication System assigned
  • Additional Properties: Integration with C4C enabled = X and No Multiple Address Handling = X
  • Inbound Service active: Business Partner - Replicate from Client to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (SOAP)
  • Communication User linked to the Communication System and Communication Arrangement
  • iFlow Replicate Business Partner to SAP S4HANA Cloud deployed and running in SAP Cloud Integration

Question:
What could be causing the error BP_DATAREPL_FND/006 with all this configuration in place? Is there any additional configuration needed specifically for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to authorize the inbound replication coming from SAP Sales Cloud Version 2?

Any help or relevant SAP Notes would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: How do we delete Project demand
entry.content: In the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system, a demand was created in the Manage Project Demand app with an incorrect name and was immediately closed. However, while attempting to create a new demand with the correct name, the system does not allow it as the activity type is already in use. Kindly advise on how this issue can be resolved.

entry.title: Incoterms based on Ship-to Party
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a business scenario where we need to determine the incoterms based on Ship-to Party than the sold-to. However, standard system does not allow us to do this. Please note, we are not using Transportation management functionality either.

Thanks
